name: New Relic, Inc.
description: New Relic is a leading cloud-based observability platform that provides engineers and businesses with comprehensive insights into their software performance. The company's platform offers full-stack monitoring, AI-driven analytics, and real-time data visualization to help organizations track user interactions, optimize digital experiences, and resolve technical issues efficiently. By integrating application performance monitoring, infrastructure health, and security data into a unified interface, New Relic enables teams to improve system reliability, reduce downtime, and accelerate innovation across complex, modern technology stacks.
